---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new task type, model, validation layer, or benchmark extension
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

A clear description of what you want to add or change.

## Motivation

Why is this feature useful? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Implementation

How might this be implemented? Are there relevant prior works or existing code to build on?

## Alternatives Considered

What alternatives have you considered, and why is this approach preferred?

## Relevant Issues / PRs

Link to related issues or pull requests.
